docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF MIGUEL MALDONADO. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT KEITH WRIGHT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MALDONADO, MIGUEL AS TO DEFENDANT WRIGHT, KEITH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
